steps.title: Set up the function evaluation
steps.content: We're given $f(x) = 36x + 1,000$. Since the monthly payment is $400, we need to evaluate $f(400)$.

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 400$:

$$f(400) = 36(400) + 1,000 = 14,400 + 1,000 = 15,400$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
